name: PEARL: Auditable Repair for Scientific Reasoning Graph Extraction

description: arXiv:2607.17917v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Scientific Reasoning Graph Extraction (SRGE) aims to recover explicit links among observations, evidence, intermediate claims, and paper-level conclusions. LLMs can produce graph-like scientific explanations, but their outputs often mix malformed syntax, drifting edge labels, incorrectly oriented roots, and weak source anchors. We propose PEARL (P...
author: Bohan Su, Pengze Li, Yuchen Lu, Xi Chen
